query:
SELECT 'products' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM products WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01';
SELECT poNumber, deletedProductCount, deletedTaskCount, deletedByName, deletedAt FROM purchase_order_deletion_logs WHERE poNumber = 'PO-20260512-01' ORDER BY deletedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
